Off Calendar Dec-19-2016 Continued To Mar-01-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Dismissal Of Class Action Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Nov-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. Plaintiff Spencer Janssen's motion for dismissal of class action without prejudice is granted. Good cause shown. The moving party is to provide a form of order that tracks the tentative ruling verbatim.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
